hero.lede: I strengthen the way people think and work — with AI, intelligent systems and automation that let one person achieve what once required an entire team.
manifesto.lead: In the Cyberpunk universe, a ripperdoc did not just heal — they upgraded the person. They gave people new senses, faster reflexes and more control over their own capabilities. They opened a path beyond biological limits.
manifesto.quote: The goal is not to replace people, but to amplify how they think, decide and act.
manifesto.body1: A modern ripperdoc does not install implants. They help people see more through data, think faster with AI and act more effectively through systems that remember context.
manifesto.body2: Today, that role belongs to specialists in AI, automation and intelligent tools. They give people systems that let one person do work that once required an entire team — without losing control.
manifesto.body3: I design those extensions quietly, precisely and always around the person using them. Technology expands capability; the human remains the hero.
services.title: Technology around the human — never in their place.
services.sub: I design systems that expand the capabilities of the person who stays at the centre of the work.
pillar1.p: AI agents and decision support that help people analyze more information faster — without giving up control.
pillar2.p: Connected systems and automations that remember, coordinate and execute tasks — turning intent into action.
pillar3.p: Tools and environments that bring artificial intelligence into real work — reliably, privately and at scale.
work.title: The body is the first layer of intelligence.
work.body:
You can't amplify the mind while ignoring the body. Training affects circulation, focus, sleep, stress and learning — a signal of how you perform, recover and regain readiness.

RipperSync collects that signal from the devices already measuring your body (watches, bands, rings, sleep sensors, cardio gear, VR, Health Connect), and a private AI coach turns it into a trend: readiness for load, the need to recover, the effect of effort on attention and energy. You can talk to the coach; it remembers your history and suggests the next step. It doesn't train for you — the decision stays with you.

Health data is sensitive, so RipperSync runs on private infrastructure: your own hardware, a dedicated server, or a device provided for this system. Never moved to someone else's cloud.
work.note: RipperSync collects data from your devices and turns it into AI-assisted decisions. Health data is sensitive, so it runs self-hosted — on your NAS or VPS, under your control. Integrations like Oura and Withings (via Health Connect) are examples — more are added per client, depending on the hardware you have or plan to get. A voice agent with ElevenLabs is planned for later versions.
work.stack: Kotlin · Jetpack Compose · MCP · Meta Quest 3 · Meta Spatial SDK
proof.title: Capability you can measure.
stat1.l: hours per week recovered for the team
stat2.l: more work done by one person
stat3.l: does what once took a team
contact.title: What could you do if technology worked with you?
contact.body: Let's start with a diagnostic consultation. Together we will find where you lose time, focus and momentum, then I will design a system around you: agents, automations and knowledge tools that remove repetitive work and give space back to what truly requires a human. I do not replace people — I strengthen what they already do well.
